text:
>Submitter-Id:	current-users
>Originator:	Alex
>Organization:	
>Confidential:	no
>Synopsis:	Re: kern/126742: [panic] kernel panic when sending file via ng_ubt(4)
>Severity:	serious
>Priority:	medium
>Category:	kern
>Class:		sw-bug
>Release:	7-STABLE
>Environment:	FreeBSD moshnroll 7.0-STABLE FreeBSD 7.0-STABLE #0: Tue Aug 19 21:20:04 CEST 2008     root@moshnroll:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/ARUNDEL  i386
>Description:
ok. one last try. i'll simply attach the dmesg output as a file.
>How-To-Repeat:

>Fix:
